name: GenFlat Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Business Overview GenFlat Holdings, Inc. (the Company , we , our or us ), is an early-stage company that developed a more sustainable collapsible marine container (the GenFlat Container ), that can be collapsed when emptied and stacked in bundles of four collapsed containers that take the same space as a standard marine container. When GenFlat Containers are stacked 4-to-1, they can save up to 75% on: 1) freight costs, terminal handling fees, transloading fees, and other fees; ...
